findings.title: LLM loads and merges BMAD YAML config on every activation
findings.detail: Determinism confidence: high. Estimated token savings: 120-250 per invocation when config is unchanged. Implementation complexity: moderate. Language: python. Could be prepass: yes. Feeds scanner: structure or execution-efficiency prepass. Reusable across skills: yes (shared _bmad/config merge). Help pattern savings: n/a — invoke a small `merge_bmad_config.py --json` (or similar) and pass JSON into context instead of re-reading instructions.
findings.action: Add a script that reads `_bmad/config.yaml` and `_bmad/config.user.yaml`, deep-merges keys, applies documented defaults, and emits compact JSON or a one-line summary for the agent.

findings.title: Context envelope parsing and field extraction delegated to the LLM
findings.detail: Determinism confidence: high for structured envelopes. Estimated token savings: 200-600 per delegation when envelope is YAML/JSON. Implementation complexity: moderate. Language: python. Could be prepass: yes. Feeds scanner: any workflow scanner expecting envelope shape. Reusable across skills: yes (Marcus-style envelopes). Help pattern savings: document schema via script `--help` / `--schema` to avoid inlining field lists in prompts.
findings.action: Provide a validator/parser script (e.g. jsonschema or pydantic) that parses the context envelope, lists missing required keys (content type, learning objectives, etc.), and outputs a normalized JSON blob for Gary to reason over.

findings.title: Interactive greeting asks the LLM to compute exemplar mastery counts
findings.detail: Determinism confidence: certain. Estimated token savings: 80-200 per interactive activation. Implementation complexity: trivial. Language: python. Could be prepass: yes. Feeds scanner: script-opportunities or onboarding prepass. Reusable across skills: yes (any woodshed catalog). Help pattern savings: n/a.
findings.action: Script reads `resources/exemplars/gamma/_catalog.yaml`, counts exemplars by status (e.g. mastered vs total), and prints a single line for the greeting.

findings.title: Woodshed activation: catalog load and circuit-breaker checks are rule-based
findings.detail: Determinism confidence: high. Estimated token savings: 100-400 per woodshed session start. Implementation complexity: moderate. Language: python. Could be prepass: yes. Feeds scanner: execution-deps or workflow integrity. Reusable across skills: partial (woodshed + catalog schema). Help pattern savings: n/a.
findings.action: Script loads `_catalog.yaml`, surfaces `circuit_breaker` limits, current attempt tallies from session state file or env, and emits PASS/WARN/BLOCK with reasons — LLM only handles exceptions.

findings.title: First-run sidecar file and directory initialization described as LLM steps
findings.detail: Determinism confidence: certain. Estimated token savings: 150-400 on first run. Implementation complexity: trivial. Language: either. Could be prepass: no (one-shot bootstrap). Feeds scanner: n/a. Reusable across skills: yes (template for other agent sidecars). Help pattern savings: `init_gamma_sidecar.sh --help` can list created paths instead of duplicating in init.md.
findings.action: Replace procedural markdown with a bash or Python bootstrap that creates `_bmad/memory/gamma-specialist-sidecar/`, writes stub `index.md`, `patterns.md`, `chronology.md`, and seeds `access-boundaries.md` from a template.

findings.title: Documented parameter merge order is a deterministic deep-merge over YAML sources
findings.detail: Determinism confidence: high for layers 1-4 when inputs are structured. Estimated token savings: 200-500 per recommendation when style guide + template + envelope are merged mechanically. Implementation complexity: moderate. Language: python. Could be prepass: yes. Feeds scanner: parameter recommendation prepass. Reusable across skills: yes. Help pattern savings: `--merge-order` in script help replaces verbose merge bullets.
findings.action: Implement `merge_gamma_parameters.py` that takes paths or stdin for API defaults, style guide slice, CT template, and envelope overrides; outputs resolved YAML/JSON; Gary only adjusts layer 5 (per-request judgment).

findings.title: Condensation trigger uses numeric thresholds the LLM must estimate by reading files
findings.detail: Determinism confidence: certain. Estimated token savings: 300-800 per check if agent would otherwise read full patterns.md. Implementation complexity: trivial. Language: python. Could be prepass: yes. Feeds scanner: token/structure prepass. Reusable across skills: yes (any append-only memory file). Help pattern savings: n/a.
findings.action: Script counts entries and/or words in `patterns.md`, compares to 200 / 5000 thresholds, outputs JSON `{condense_recommended, entry_count, word_count}` for the agent to act on without scanning the file body.

findings.title: Doc refresh pipeline: read YAML sources, compare dates, flag stale docs
findings.detail: Determinism confidence: high for file reads and timestamp comparison; changelog fetch is deterministic given URL. Estimated token savings: 500+ tokens when LLM would otherwise re-walk URLs manually. Implementation complexity: moderate. Language: python. Could be prepass: yes. Feeds scanner: gamma-api-mastery or doc drift scanner. Reusable across skills: yes (any doc-sources.yaml pattern). Help pattern savings: n/a.
findings.action: Script reads `doc-sources.yaml`, compares `last_refreshed` to policy or remote Last-Modified, lists stale entries, optionally diffs cached vs fetched TOC — LLM only interprets ambiguous API semantics.

findings.title: Structured fields from exemplar brief.md listed for manual extraction
findings.detail: Determinism confidence: moderate (depends on brief.md conventions). Estimated token savings: 150-400 per exemplar when headings are stable. Implementation complexity: moderate. Language: python. Could be prepass: yes. Feeds scanner: exemplar study prepass. Reusable across skills: partial. Help pattern savings: n/a.
findings.action: Parser script extracts frontmatter and/or fixed heading sections from `brief.md` into JSON (layout pattern, pedagogical type, agent guidance); LLM retains visual analysis of `source/` artifacts only.

findings.title: Markdown exemplar table duplicates authoritative _catalog.yaml
findings.detail: Determinism confidence: certain for drift detection. Estimated token savings: 50-150 per edit cycle (avoid human/LLM sync errors). Implementation complexity: trivial. Language: python. Could be prepass: yes. Feeds scanner: structure scanner. Reusable across skills: yes. Help pattern savings: n/a.
findings.action: CI or script generates the markdown table from `_catalog.yaml`, or lints that table rows match YAML ids — single source of truth.

findings.title: quality_assessment YAML structure could be validated after LLM fills scores
findings.detail: Determinism confidence: certain. Estimated token savings: 100-300 per return when invalid shape would trigger retries. Implementation complexity: trivial. Language: python. Could be prepass: no. Feeds scanner: postprocessing hook for Marcus. Reusable across skills: yes. Help pattern savings: jsonschema/yamllint errors replace long 'format' prose in prompts over time.
findings.action: Add validation script (jsonschema or pydantic) for the documented `quality_assessment` object including required dimension keys and 0.0-1.0 bounds.

findings.title: Parameter recommendation YAML block is schema-validatable
findings.detail: Determinism confidence: certain. Estimated token savings: 50-120 per invocation. Implementation complexity: trivial. Language: python. Could be prepass: no. Feeds scanner: optional. Reusable across skills: partial (Gamma-specific). Help pattern savings: n/a.
findings.action: Reuse or extend the same schema validator for `parameters` / `reasoning` blocks before handoff to gamma-api-mastery.

findings.title: Sidecar expected file layout could be linted without LLM inspection
findings.detail: Determinism confidence: certain. Estimated token savings: 80-150 when diagnosing misconfigured repos. Implementation complexity: trivial. Language: either. Could be prepass: yes. Feeds scanner: structure-capabilities prepass. Reusable across skills: yes. Help pattern savings: n/a.
findings.action: Script verifies `gamma-specialist-sidecar/` contains `index.md`, `patterns.md`, `chronology.md`, `access-boundaries.md` and reports missing files.

summary.assessment: Estimated aggregate savings: roughly 2.0k–4.5k tokens per full session (activation + delegation + woodshed + save-memory checks) if prepass scripts supply merged config, envelope validation, catalog metrics, doc-refresh status, and patterns.md size JSON. Highest-value targets: context envelope parse/validate (SKILL.md), doc refresh staleness pipeline (exemplar-study.md), and patterns.md condensation metrics (save-memory.md). Six findings are strong prepass candidates for LLM scanners or orchestrators; the agent has no scripts/ folder yet, so no duplicate-risk with existing automation. Parameter and quality YAML validators double as standalone lints for CI.
